sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105012" key="triku/aqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐκύᾰθος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105012.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holding three</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύαθοι,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
